name: Cranberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lukewarm water, tang, and cranberries in a large bowl.
2. Add the strawberry butter, sea salt, bread flour, whole wheat flour, and dry yeast to the bowl.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Cover the dough and let it rise for 30 minutes.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
6. Set the settings on your mixer to [BREAD], [LIGHT], and adjust the timer delay up to 10 hours.
7. Bake the loaf at 2 lbs, aiming for a moderate texture and medium brown color.
8. Remove the bread from the oven when ready and let it cool before slicing.
